reviews.text: Sean was absolutely the best Colorado Wedding Photographer! He photographed both our engagement pictures and our wedding and I couldnвҖҷt be happier with the results! He was professional, funny, and a downright fantastic photographer! He had an eye for creative and beautiful backgrounds which made our photos unique and one of a kind. He did everything we wanted and so much more. I couldnвҖҷt have asked for someone better to capture our incredible day.

Sean did my engagement shoot and my wedding. IвҖҷm so glad he did. He took two normal people and produced absolutely incredible photos we will have forever. I canвҖҷt thank him enough. If there is one thing we absolutely did right when planning our wedding, it was hiring Sean Lara Photography. Without question.

We are completely blown away by our photos. They are beyond anything we could have ever imagined. Every single image brings us right back to how the day felt, the emotion, the joy, the quiet moments, the chaos, the love. Sean didnвҖҷt just take pictures; he told our story in the most authentic and beautiful way.

Looking through our gallery feels like reliving the best day of our lives over and over again. These photos are priceless to us and something we will cherish for the rest of our lives.

Sean is incredibly talented, intentional, and clearly cares deeply about his work and the people heвҖҷs capturing. We are endlessly grateful that we trusted him with such an important moment. If youвҖҷre even thinking about booking Sean Lara Photography, do it. You will never regret it.

Forever thankful,
The BradshawвҖҷs

Sean does such good work. Love our wedding and engagement photos. He was very easy to work with making the processes feel much less awkward. He was even very kind in letting us add our dog to photos at the last minute. Highly recommend.

Sean is the most professional, easy-going TALENTED photographer we've ever seen. His photos do not disappoint, every time I show them to someone they just about faint in awe of our wedding photos. He should be able to name his price for any photo he takes. Hire him. You won't regret it.
